Registration for $STAR Airdrop IS OPEN

Welcome to StarHeroes, the first multiplayer third-person space shooter designed for esports. With its top-quality dynamic and competitive gameplay, StarHeroes provides players with what they crave most: true gaming emotions.

Explore our #NFTs

StarHeroes will offer various non-exchangeable tokens, including StarHeroes and skins. Make sure to get your own Hero - it’s your golden ticket to earning $STAR!

STARHEROES

Guardian, Degen or maybe Interstellar? Pick your path to glory, Airman!

STARSHIPS

Dominate the Galaxy in your own customized spaceship: Shooter, Tank or Supporter!

Dominate the Galaxy in your own customized spaceship: Shooter, Tank or Supporter!

Q4 2019

Beginning of development

Q2 2022

Closed Alpha

Q1 2023

Open Alpha

Q4 2023

Beta Space Elite

Q1 2024

Early Access

Q2 2024

Full Game Launch

StarHeroes is a project run according to a long-term strategy. We've been building the game for more than 2.5 years now, simultaneously integrating it with blockchain and building an active community of gamers around it. All this to unleash the full esports potential of web3 after the game launch.

Multiple utilities combined in one token: $STAR

Our player-centric tokenomics ensures max sustainability through limited token inflation and smart deflationary mechanisms.
